seo_title: How AI Can Help Advance Nuclear Renaissance
meta_description: MIT Assistant Professor Dean Price discusses how AI can improve nuclear energy, a crucial part of the US energy infrastructure.
body_html:
According to MIT Assistant Professor Dean Price, AI can help advance the nuclear renaissance by improving safety and economics.

Current State of Nuclear Energy

  • Nearly 20% of US electricity comes from nuclear power
  • 94 nuclear reactors operate in the US, more than any other country
  • The number of people maintaining nuclear infrastructure is incredibly small

Nuclear Engineers and Carbon-Free Energy Generation

By becoming a nuclear engineer, you become one of a select few responsible for carbon-free energy generation in the US.

  • The nuclear engineering community is small, close-knit, and welcoming
  • Most people in this field are not inclined to do anything else

Nuclear Reactor Design and Safety

Dean Price aims to design and usher in a new class of nuclear reactors that build on the safety, economics, and reliability of existing nuclear fleets.

  • The goal is to improve reactor design and safety while reducing costs
  • This objective has not wavered despite initial skepticism

AI Applications in Nuclear Energy

AI can help improve nuclear energy by analyzing physical processes, optimizing performance, and predicting maintenance needs.

  • AI can illuminate relationships between physical processes
  • This can lead to improved reactor design and safety

source.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
source.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
